cards.name: Tendrils of Reclamation
cards.design_note: Good opener — efficient cleansing at Vigil and Dusk. Custom dissolve with range 3 is excellent burst reach. Consider if rng3 dissolve is too reliable as a dissolve-pump.

cards.name: Deep Roots
cards.design_note: Flexible card: grow network (Vigil) or cleanse anywhere (Dusk). Range 0 on Dusk means it works with presence anywhere on board.

cards.name: Earthen Mending
cards.design_note: Pure corruption cleanse. Vigil at range 0 is safe setup; Dusk at range 2 gives reach.

cards.name: Ancient Cleansing
cards.design_note: Strong cleanse burst on Dusk (2 corruption anywhere). Good for late-game Sacred Site protection.

cards.name: Subterranean Surge
cards.design_note: Wide-reach cleanse on both phases. Useful for spreading coverage across the board.

cards.name: Healing Earth
cards.design_note: Weave + cleanse combo. Weave recovery on Vigil means you can hold Dusk cleanse for threats. Only card in cleanse cluster with Weave.

cards.name: Reclaim the Soil
cards.design_note: Reinforce an existing Presence territory (Vigil), then cleanse 2 Corruption adjacent to it (Dusk rng1). Rewards planting near corruption hotspots.

cards.name: Verdant Restoration
cards.design_note: Steady cleanse with increasing range across phases. Safe and consistent.

cards.name: Root Dominance
cards.design_note: High-reach power card. Place presence far out, then big cleanse. Rewarding if you build network first.

cards.name: Embrace the Earth
cards.design_note: Flipped from 002 — cleanse first, grow second. Interesting tempo choice depending on board state.

cards.name: Shiver of the Ancient
cards.design_note: Fear engine with network synergy. Dissolve expands reach to range 2. Synergizes with Network Fear passive.

cards.name: Dread Awakening
cards.design_note: Massive Dusk fear spike (4). Good for threshold pushes. Weaker Vigil so consider card order carefully.

cards.name: Whisper of Roots
cards.design_note: Balanced fear card. Steady 5 total fear across phases.

cards.name: The Forest Remembers
cards.design_note: Mirror of 013 — heavier on Vigil. Good if you need threshold early in turn.

cards.name: Trembling Earth

dusk.desc: Deal 2 damage to invaders in range 1

cards.design_note: Fear + combat hybrid. Dusk damage at range 1 needs network near invader. Consider if range 1 is too restrictive.

cards.name: Ancient Dread
cards.design_note: Big Vigil fear (4). Strong opener for threshold timing. Similar to 012 but front-loaded.

cards.name: Root Terror
cards.design_note: Fear + rout combo. Rout at Dusk buys time after fear burst at Vigil. Note: RoutInvaders is currently stubbed — needs Phase 6 implementation.

cards.name: Darkness Below
cards.design_note: Same totals as 013 (5 fear) but reversed distribution. Consider differentiating — maybe add a small presence or corruption effect to one of 013/018.

cards.name: Spreading Growth
cards.design_note: Pure network expansion. Escalating range Vigil→Dusk. Essential for Network Fear passive and Assimilation reach.

cards.name: Vast Network
cards.design_note: Reverse of 019. Useful for reaching distant territories at Vigil, then consolidating at Dusk.

cards.name: Creeping Vines
cards.design_note: Place + move. MovePresence is stubbed in Phase 5 — will be powerful for repositioning once Phase 6 implements it.

cards.name: Lattice of Life
cards.design_note: Move + place. Similar to 021 but reversed. Both MovePresence cards are future-facing (stubbed in Phase 5).

cards.name: Rootbound
cards.design_note: Double down on an existing territory (Vigil rng0 = holy site reinforcement). Strong for creating a heavily-stacked sacred site to anchor Network Fear. Then cleanse adjacent (Dusk).

cards.name: Boundless Growth
cards.design_note: Massive reach on Dusk (range 3 = almost anywhere on 3×3 grid). Key card for late network expansion.

cards.name: Stir the Sleeping
cards.design_note: Pure hand recovery — awaken 1 on both phases. Synergizes with deliberate dissolution strategy. Consider if this is too efficient (2 awakenings per play).

cards.name: Call from Slumber

dusk.desc: Awaken all dormant cards in hand

cards.design_note: Value=0 means awaken ALL dormant cards. Potentially explosive late-game recovery. Watch hand size limits when this fires.

cards.name: Rise, Ancient One
cards.design_note: Grow network then recover a card. Balanced utility card. Good mid-game inclusion.

cards.name: Dream of the Root
cards.design_note: Recover dormant card at Vigil, then use the freed-up hand slot to place presence at Dusk. Nice sequencing.

cards.name: Living Wall

dusk.desc: Deal 3 damage to invaders in range 1

cards.design_note: Presence + heavy damage (3 at range 1). Defensive card. Requires adjacency. Strong in Resolution phase combat.

cards.name: Ancient Pulse
cards.design_note: Weave recovery + fear generation. Good sustain card. Restores 2 Weave (significant in long encounters). One of only two Weave recovery cards in the deck.
